problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Combining BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
